title: Maintenance

Maintenance

Maintenance

It shows the parts consumption data for the Controller or Manipulator parts.

For more details, refer to the following manual:

For RC700-D, RC700-E:

Robot Controller Manual  "Alarm"

For RC700, RC90 series:

Robot Controller Maintenance Manual  "Alarm"

For T, VT series:

Robot Maintenance Manual  "Alarm"
